briefs.title: Representation Agreements Can Now Be Witnessed Remotely via Audiovisual Technology in BC
briefs.summary: Effective January 1, 2023, BC's Representation Agreement Regulation allows adults to sign representation agreements with witnesses present electronically (via audiovisual technology), provided the witness is a lawyer or notary public.
briefs.action_required: If your business assists clients with representation agreements, ensure remote witnessing uses a lawyer or notary and includes the required alternative-process statement.

key_dates.label: BC Representation Agreement remote witnessing rules take effect
